name: Ego-Robot
caption: The autonomous agent navigating the environment. It is currently positioned in the center of Room 0, equipped with a 360-degree LiDAR and panoramic vision system for real-time spatial reasoning.

name: chair
caption: A sleek blue ergonomic chair with a high backrest and mesh fabric. It is tucked into the far corner of the room, featuring silver adjustable armrests and a five-star nylon base with smooth rollers.
instruction: Navigate to the sleek blue ergonomic chair in the far corner that features a high backrest, mesh fabric, and silver adjustable armrests.

name: table
caption: A heavy green wooden table with a polished surface. It is situated in the upper right corner, supported by four thick solid legs, providing a stable platform for heavy laboratory equipment or monitors.
instruction: Go to the heavy green wooden table located in the upper right corner, characterized by its polished surface and four thick solid legs.

name: cabinet
caption: A tall orange storage cabinet made of industrial-grade steel. It features three lockable drawers and a matte finish, standing against the left wall to maximize the central workspace area for the robot.
instruction: Find the tall orange industrial-grade steel cabinet standing against the left wall that features a matte finish and three lockable drawers.

name: screen
caption: A large purple screen mounted on a black swivel stand. The glossy screen surface reflects the room's lighting, currently positioned in the bottom right corner for peripheral status monitoring.
instruction: Navigate to the large purple screen in the bottom right corner, mounted on a black swivel stand and featuring a glossy screen surface.

name: chair
caption: A low-profile blue swivel chair without armrests. Its compact design allows it to fit into tight spaces, featuring a breathable fabric seat and a single central support pillar with manual height adjustment.
instruction: Go to the compact, low-profile blue swivel chair that has no armrests and is supported by a single central pillar.

name: table
caption: A small square green side table located near the entrance corner. Its minimalist design includes a thin metal frame and a durable plastic top, suitable for holding minor peripheral devices or sensors.
instruction: Navigate to the small square green side table near the entrance corner, featuring a minimalist thin metal frame and a plastic top.

name: cabinet
caption: A mid-sized orange filing cabinet with a textured metallic exterior. It is placed adjacent to the right wall, containing several horizontal dividers for organizing documents and spare mechanical components.
instruction: Find the mid-sized orange filing cabinet with a textured metallic exterior and horizontal dividers, positioned adjacent to the right wall.

name: screen
caption: A wide purple ultrawide screen oriented towards the room center. It features a thin bezel design and is currently displaying a complex data visualization, aiding in remote teleoperation tasks.
instruction: Navigate to the purple ultrawide screen that features a thin bezel and is oriented towards the center of the room.

name: chair
caption: A blue folding chair with a reinforced aluminum frame. It is temporarily stored in the upper right corner, featuring a high-density foam cushion and a lightweight structure for easy relocation.
instruction: Go to the lightweight blue folding chair stored in the upper right corner, featuring a reinforced aluminum frame and a high-density foam cushion.

name: cabinet
caption: An orange overhead cabinet mounted near the ceiling corner. It provides additional vertical storage space, constructed from lightweight composite materials with a sliding door mechanism for easy access.
instruction: Navigate to the orange overhead cabinet mounted near the ceiling corner that features a sliding door mechanism.
